To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. title: Salomon Women's Speedcross 3 Trail Running Shoe
description: Salomon was born in 1947 in the heart of the French Alps and the birthplace of modern alpinism. Driven by a passion for skiing and design innovation, Francois Salomon and his son George designed and perfected much of the first modern ski equipment. During the following 60 years, Salomon's commitment to innovative design and passion for mountain sports created a vast range of revolutionary new concepts in boots, skis and apparel and brought innovative solutions to footwear, apparel and equipment for hiking, adventure racing, mountaineering and trail running. Through performance-driven design, Salomon enhances mountain sports by converting new ideas into action and expanding the limits of possibility.

title: ASICS Women's Gel-Venture 5 Running Shoes
description:
The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.

AHAR Outsole: Acronym for ASICS High Abrasion Rubber. Placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durability.

reviews.title: Less structured support, lots of rubber to the road
reviews.text: Really like these; plenty of expected toe room (hallelujah!👏)  The footbed is more flat and neutral than my other Adidas, but they’re good. Less support, but still comfy. I love Adidas balance between support and bounce; some shoes i have sunk into so hard, they’re too much work to wear for someone with extra weight! Then there are the hard-as-cardboard styles that offer so much “support” they’re painful and unbearable. Not these! They conform yet manage to be stable; balance, zen-like ✌🏼 I am now officially an Adidas lady for the haul, they’re impressive. Oh, these are a bit wide on me, likely perfect on an “average” width foot. Oh, that glorious toe room! 💜 and one more thing; the platform is wider than any other shoes I have, and actually was hard to get used to. But I have.

features: ⛈️【High Quality & Weatherproof】Our runner shoe lights are made of aluminum alloy and ABS plastic, IPX5 Waterproof, these lights for shoes are built to withstand the toughest rainstorm. Rather it be snow or heavy rain, our gear got your cover.

🔆【Lightweight & Bright】They are pretty lightweight (each light weights only 25g). It stays stable while you walk or run without you even notice. These shoe lights for night safety are bright which can increase your visibility to avoid tripping on things and seeing the path. Let you see and be seen safely in the dark from dusk till dawn.

💡【Upgraded Hidden Switch】Press on the head of the shoe light to turn on/off and switch 3 different modes base on your need (Always Bright, Flashing, or Flashing slowly). It can retain power for 72 hours on its highest setting. An essential safety equipment for any low-light activity.

✨【Easy to Install】Night runner shoe lights the bottom design allows you to fix the shoe light on your shoelace or straps firmly. Note: Please remove the insulating paper between the two batteries at first.

🏃🏽【Application to All Outdoor Activities】Runners shoe lights for night safety, these lights for shoes are hands-free lighting solution for runners, hikers, or any outdoor enthusiast. You can safely trek through mountains, trails, or your own neighborhood knowing you’ve got reliable, safe lighting at all times. Whether running, cycling, walking, hiking, camping, fishing, or walking your dog.

reviews.title: Work great
reviews.text: I was excited to receive these. I also have a pair that stick in the hole on the shoes. I prefer these, however, because you can adjust where the beam is directed by moving the heel strap around. I use my crocs for taking care of the chickens. So this is great for the walk to the coop every night.

reviews.title: Good quality
reviews.text: Great little product gives good light and I can pop them on my tennis shoes for camping.

reviews.title: Fun little headlights for your shoes
reviews.text: I've had these lights on my shoes full time for the last few days, and I really like them for evening walks.  They don't replace a flashlight, but they do light up a fair amount of the path that I wouldn't otherwise see with my small flashlight.  I've smacked them against car doors and chair rails a few times, and they've stayed solidly on my feet and are no worse for wear.  They are great for visibility for others too - your feet move a lot, and so do these lights.  Add flashing and you're much more visible either walking or on a bicycle.  I think they'd also be great for camping, and maybe at a dance party (flashing feet might be fun!)  My only thought is that they seem a little pricey, but they are one of the few that go on shoe laces and not just popping into holes in Crocs.  They're quite sturdy and battery life is great too.

reviews.title: Perfect for early morning/night walking
reviews.text: I bought these lights for an upcoming hike to the Grand Canyon in October. We need to start our hike before sunrise and thought these would be the perfect accessory to stop us from tripping in the dark. What I like - they are small and lightweight, with a secure clip for my shoes. The battery is a standard size. They are easy to turn off and on. I'm undecided on if these are really bright enough to be practical... is there a light - yes. Is it going to replace a flashlight - absolutely not. I don't know if I'd buy these again for the purpose of a hike, but they would be good if you are an early morning/late evening walker and runner and want additional lights for safety so cars, etc, can see you.

reviews.title: They are ok

reviews.title: Affordable and comfortable
reviews.text:
Update: I decided to keep these. Ok, so I am ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee, I tried them for everyday but couldn't get over what I'll call the "dad sneakers" look. But I took these for a run and wow! They're very comfortable. A little clunky but flexible enough for daily training and the cushion is just right for me, sightly on the plush side but not squishy. These are my new daily runners. I don't know how long they'll last, but for the price, if I get 200 miles, I'll be happy.

Also, if you're a 3e/4e and you like or need a wide toe box, these will deliver. I'm a smaller 4e but i need a wide toe box, especially since I'm not willing to give up my injinji toe socks. These are very spacious with plenty of room for my toe splay.

-----

Original review: From the product pictures I wasn't sure if I'd like them or hate them. But for the price I figured I might as well try them. They fit nicely, have moderate cushion, and they're more flexible than I expected. They're basic sneakers, no bells or whistles. But they're comfortable enough I would try running in them. They're certainly not fashion forward, but I wouldn't be ashamed to wear them with jeans and a tee. And if you're looking for extra-wide these fit like a true 4e. I expected to hate them but I'm pleasantly surprised and I'll probably keep them and use they for everyday sneakers or runners.

title: New Balance Kids' 680 V6 Hook and Loop Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 680 v6 kids' running shoe is a sneaker that blends style and performance to satisfy both kids and adults alike. A modern design ups your little one's cool factor, featuring a no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel that's snug and secure without being too tight, delivering both a comfortable fit and contemporary style. The streamlined silhouette on these running shoes for kids includes leather and mesh upper material with a stitched-down tip and foxing details for flexible support and lasting durability. These kids' performance shoes also include an ABZORB midsole that absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, for a cushioned ride that takes kiddos from the classroom to the playground and everywhere in between. These comfortable kids' running shoes are available in a variety of colors that range from neutral to bold and bright, so your child can pick the one that suits their style and boosts their confidence.
features: Rubber sole
Power in Simplicity: The New Balance 680v6 running shoe for kids features a minimal leather and open mesh upper, offering flexible support and easy-breezy comfort
Modern Construction for an Outstanding Fit: The leather/mesh upper on these New Balance kids' running shoes features a stitched-down tip and foxing details to provide flexible support and durability
Soft Underfoot Cushioning: The ABZORB midsole absorbs impact through a combination of cushioning and compression resistance, giving these kids' running shoes a comfortable feel that lasts all day
Designed for Support and Durability: These kids' performance shoes feature a strong rubber outsole to offer long-lasting durability, built to stand up to daily use and playground wear-and-tear
Available in a Range of Colors: From neutral tones to bold hues, these cushioned running shoes for kids are available in a range of shades to suit the style and color preferences of your little one

I’ll probably have to buy them new shoes soon which is a shame because it’s not like these are some off brand cheapies. You expect more from a company like NB.

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: These New Balance shoes are great. The insoles are so comfortable and I know that my little one is getting the protection that she needs for her growing feet. The shoes fit true to size, and they width is great. She has a normal foot, I wouldn't recommend them for a child with wide feet. They are comfortable to wear and look great. This particular style is great for young children due to the velcro. Most kids by the time they get to this style shoe CAN tie their own shoes, but its so much easier and quicker for them just to  be able to do the velcro and go!We love them.

reviews.title: Maybe I just got a defective pair of shoes...
reviews.text: The insoles don’t fit the shoes, nor were they glued in. So they kept sliding out. Nice looking shoe from a distance but they are falling apart.

title: New Balance Women's 430 V1 Running Shoe
description:
Two layers of cushioning support deliver a plush ride in the 430 women's running shoe from New Balance. Mesh on the durable leather upper breathes as your run heats up.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.

reviews.title: Love these comfortable shoes
reviews.text: These shoes are as it is described for their comfort. It's like walking on a mattress and so much room. I ordered 8.5 wide width because I like a lot of room for my feet. I will most likely get another pair. Great for for heels with Achilles pain.

reviews.title: Good cushioning.
reviews.text: These have more support than my Asics running shoes. They fit my narrow feet quite well. I wear men's shoes due to long feet, so width can be a challenge. They're well made.

reviews.title: Great running shoes
reviews.text: Great looking shoe that fits well. Plenty of cushion and extremely light weight. I’ve been using Asics for over 5 years now and have never wanted to switch. These are comparable to both quality and performance. Overall very please. Will be using these for running as well as casual wear.

reviews.title: 5 stars
reviews.text: My son has the widest feet that I have ever seen in my life. These shoes are perfect for him. He said that they are very comfortable and they fit him true to size. He LOVES them!

reviews.title: Solid support!
reviews.text:
As these are made for speed, the weight should tell you these really are made of lightweight materials.
Are there lighter shoes out there?
Well, you're the runner, not me, but I suspect yes, probably.
I also suspect the lighter the shoe, the higher the price and the shorter the life, but what do I know......

title: Mizuno Women's Wave Horizon 2 Running Shoe
description:
Introducing the softest, most stable ride ever to come out of Mizuno running. Our new stability technology called smooth ride support is combined with cloud Wave to create a soft, lively and cushioned feel with adequate support and smooth guidance.
Since our founding in 1906, we at Mizuno have taken special pride and pleasure in being able to participate in the exciting world of sports and in making the entire globe the stage for our activities. Each and every one of us is guided by the ideal of true sportsmanship. That was true nearly 100 years ago and is still true today. It is evident in our corporate philosophy which, simply stated, is "Contributing to society through the advancement of sporting goods and the promotion of sports." This philosophy is clearly reflected in our strong support of numerous worldwide sport events and in our dedication to advancing sports through cutting edge technology and research. Our product development strategy is to create products with features that enhance athlete performance and are unique to only Mizuno. These technological advancements make our sporting equipment and apparel go the extra mile and keep you in tip top playing form no matter the sport nor the conditions. Whether it's our Breath Thermo line of clothing which generates heat from the absorption of moisture to keep you warm in cooler temperatures, to our line of Arctic Touch garments that expels heat and moisture generated by the body during exercise to keep your body cool and comfortable, your comfort and performance are at the forefront of our innovation. From the diamond to the track, from the court to the fairway, Mizuno's commitment to Serious Performance shines through. Today, the high quality equipment that only Mizuno can produce are relied upon by athletes throughout the world. We produce superior quality equipment for serious performance, through the artful combination of technology and craftsmanship. Because, at Mizuno, your passion is our obsession.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Shaft measures approximately low-top from arch
Cloudwave offers a plush stable and lively feel
Airmesh upper
Fit in motion upper for flexible support
Soft anatomical sockliner for extra arch support and cushioning
U4ic Midsole for cushioning

title: New Balance Kid's 519 V2 Alternative Closure Running Shoe
description: The New Balance 519v2 kids' performance shoe is made with a versatile upper and a signature REVlite midsole to form a classic shoe that's comfortable, durable and pairs effortlessly with all of your kid's go-to gear. This pair of running shoes for kids is designed with no-sew overlays to help ensure a top-notch fit and a sleek feel that's perfect for all-day, any-day wear. The synthetic and mesh construction offers breathability and a proper fit, so your little one can tackle whatever their day throws at them, from recess shenanigans with friends to after-school practice. Best of all is the cool style of these cushioned running shoes for kids. Fun, playful colors and eye-catching patterns make for a pair of sneakers that fashion-conscious youngsters will love.
features: 50% Synthetic, 50% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole
Comfortable Kids' Running Shoes: Thanks to the REVlite midsole, which delivers incredibly lightweight cushioning, these kids' running shoes easily go from the classroom to the playground and beyond
Great Fit: Designed with no-sew overlays to ensure a sleek fit and incredible feel, these kids' performance shoes will be a joy to wear for your active little one
Breathable Comfort: The synthetic and mesh uppers on these New Balance kids' running shoes create amazing breathability, helping to keep their feet comfortable when the pace picks up
Incredible Support: With a strong and durable rubber outsole, these kids' shoes provide impressive support and can stand up to daily wear-and-tear, no matter what your child gets up to
Fun, Kid-Friendly Design: These shoes are designed for kids first, with playful colors, patterns and fun designs they're sure to love whether they're headed to school, practice or the park

reviews.title: MY new blue shoes!
reviews.text: My toddler LOVES his new blue shoes! These replaced a very beloved and very worn-out pair of shoes that I needed him to finally let go of. These are so bright and fun, he loves running around and showing them to everyone. My kid is a 5.5 per the foot measuring tool we have and these seem to fit just right. He’s so proud of these new shoes! I also love that they weren’t stupidly expensive.
